summary: Nova MVP fully verified. Backend: 24/24 pytest cases pass (100%) across auth, users, follow, friends, stories, conversations/DM dedupe/group admin, messages, calls, locations, notifications, and WebSocket real-time delivery + auth. Frontend (mobile viewport 375x667): login flow, all 5 bottom tabs (Story/Chat/Calls/Locations/Settings) render and navigate, Settings profile edit + color grid visible with auto-contrast preview, Calls history shows direction/status correctly, Chat DM send works with sender enrichment, Discord-style outgoing call screen with orbit ring animation + hangup renders on /call route. No red screens or crash errors observed. Minor RN-web deprecation warnings only.

minor.issue: Returns 403 (HTTPBearer default) rather than 401. Cosmetic; test accepts either.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns: '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "textShadow".' — search for textShadowColor/textShadowOffset/textShadowRadius and consolidate into single textShadow shorthand where possible (RN 0.76+/RN-Web). Non-blocking.
Console warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — move pointerEvents from JSX prop to style object. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Replace deprecated `textShadow*` style props with the shorthand `textShadow` in components (search: textShadowColor, textShadowOffset, textShadowRadius).
(Optional / low priority) Move `pointerEvents` JSX prop to `style.pointerEvents` on affected components (RN-Web deprecation).
(Optional) Return 401 (not 403) for missing bearer token by using a custom auth dependency; purely cosmetic.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes MongoDB _id in all responses via u.pop('_id', None) — good.
All routes properly async and use motor; JWT + bcrypt correct; WebSocket authenticates via token in path.
All frontend interactive elements carry testID attributes; API base uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — good.
Google OAuth is intentionally deferred (documented as mocked/not implemented) — matches problem statement.
Calls are signaling-only (no WebRTC media) — matches problem statement; UI ring animation + status transitions verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for tested critical flows (login, 5 tabs, chat send, outgoing call, settings render)

seed_data_creation: Test users alice@nova.app / bob@nova.app confirmed (created via register if missing). Friend link between them established during friend flow test. A few TEST_-prefixed conversations/messages/stories/calls left in DB from test run (safely tagged).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL + /api. Auth via bcrypt+JWT (HS256). WebSocket at wss://<host>/api/ws/{jwt}. Frontend uses Expo Router with (tabs) group. testIDs consistent (login-*, register-*, conversation-<id>, voice-call-<id>, chat-call-button, hangup-button, etc.). Web preview: navigator.vibrate is blocked before user gesture (harmless). Calls are signaling-only (no real audio).
